add_key.method: Identify the Mercedes-derived ignition and immobiliser system before choosing diagnostic or module-data work
add_key.programming_method: Vehicle-specific diagnostic or ignition-module data route
warnings: Do not use Volkswagen passenger-car Immo IV or MQB procedures.

all_keys_lost.method: Confirm the exact electronic ignition system and supported module-data solution before accepting the job
warnings: No universal aftermarket AKL route has been verified for all variants.

add_key.method: Confirm VIN, BCM, dashboard, keyless specification and current security-access coverage
warnings: Current support must be checked against the exact vehicle.

autel_apb300.summary: Official Autel APB300 working-key Add Key coverage lists Volkswagen Crafter 2017-2021 only.

vehicle_connection.display_text: Open and read the original working key using APB300

tool_accessory_ids: Supported Autel VW/Audi-style IKEY or key PCB
warnings: Coverage is Add Key only and does not establish All Keys Lost support.
Confirm the exact key PCB and keyed or KESSY configuration before programming.
Autel states no additional adapter is needed for the APB300 working-key data route.

all_keys_lost.method: Confirm live aftermarket coverage and any online or security-gateway requirement before booking
warnings: Do not promise AKL from model year alone.
